title: Options Page Architecture (Tabs: Settings/Privacy/Genome/DeepCheck/About)
description: Build the full Options Page SPA in entrypoints/options/. Five tab structure: (1) Settings — extension preferences, theme, language; (2) Privacy — view/export/wipe controls (promotes P1.13 shell to full page); (3) Genome — links to Genome Editor (P2.2); (4) Deep Check — Amazon Creators API toggle + OAuth entry (P2.6); (5) About — version, changelog, policy links. React 19 + shadcn/ui. State from chrome.storage (not localStorage). Prefer chrome.storage.sync for cross-device settings, chrome.storage.local for sensitive data. TDD for tab routing and state loading.
